rationale.R1.2: The prose conclusions are logically inverted relative to the reported data: Table 2 shows NoCritique (76.8/69.5) > Single (74.2/67.1) > Full (71.4/64.8), yet the text asserts 'the full 3-round loop delivers the strongest results' and that 'removing the reviewer agent lowers pass@1 substantially.' Every comparative inference in the ablation narrative contradicts the numeric ordering, making logical consistency the primary load-bearing dimension.
rationale.R1.3: Each quantitative claim in the analysis paragraph is falsified by the numbers the authors themselves cite. Pass@1 monotonically decreases as critique rounds increase; the attribution of gains to the critique loop and the conclusion that both components are 'essential' are unsupported by — and directionally opposite to — the evidence in Table 2.
